# Memory

_"When X, file as Y" patterns learned from your corrections._
- (none yet)

## Merchant shortcuts
_Vendors you file consistently the same way._
- (none yet)

## Defaults
_Values to fill when I'm missing one (trip destination, currency, etc.)._
- (none yet)

## Description style
_How you like receipt descriptions phrased._

## Don't ask me about
_One-offs you've told me to handle case-by-case instead of memorizing._

step1_prompt:
💰 *Hello, {name}.*

I'm {brand_name} — your expense assistant. Send receipts, ask about claims, and I'll handle the rest.

Setup takes about 2 minutes. I'll walk you through it one step at a time.

*Step 1 of 3 — connect your AI*
Send /login to link your Claude Pro/Max subscription (or paste an API key). That's what I use to read your receipts accurately.
step2_prompt:
*Step 2 of 3 — install the Chrome extension*
This is what hands your OmniHR login to the bot.

👉 [Install it here](https://expensebot.seahyingcong.com/extension) — the page walks you through it (takes ~30 seconds).

Once installed and pinned, come back for step 3.
step3_prompt:
*Step 3 of 3 — pair your OmniHR account*
1. Sign in to your company's OmniHR in Chrome — it's at `<your-company>.omnihr.co` (e.g. `glints.omnihr.co`). If your dashboard loads without a login prompt, you're already signed in.
2. Send /connect_omnihr here — I'll reply with a 6-digit code.
3. On that OmniHR tab, click the 💰 *{brand_name}* icon in Chrome's toolbar (or the puzzle-piece menu if unpinned) → paste the code → tap *Pair*.

That's it — I'll confirm once we're connected.
ready_prompt:
👋 *All set, {name}.*

Send me a receipt — photo, PDF, whichever — and I'll file it for you. Add a caption like _"client lunch"_ if you want me to capture the context.

*Things you can ask me:*
• /list — your recent claims
• /list approved — filter by status
• _"how much did I spend in April?"_
• _"submit claim 126758"_ · _"delete the grab one"_

*Optional — give me more context about you:*
The more I know, the less I ask. Run /start to connect Gmail, Telegram, and WhatsApp — you'll need the [Janai Chrome extension](https://expensebot.seahyingcong.com/extension) for each one.
login_link_prompt:
[👆 Tap to sign in with Claude]({bridge_url})

_(opens a page — authorize, copy the token, paste it back)_
pair_code_prompt:
```
{code}
```
👆 Tap the code to copy.

*Don't have the extension yet?* [Install it here](https://expensebot.seahyingcong.com/extension) first (~30s).

*Before you paste:* make sure you're signed in to your company's OmniHR in Chrome — it's at `<your-company>.omnihr.co` (e.g. `glints.omnihr.co`). If your dashboard loads without a login prompt, you're good.

*Then:*
1. On that OmniHR tab, click the 💰 {brand_name} icon in Chrome's toolbar (or the puzzle-piece menu if it isn't pinned yet).
2. Paste the 6-digit code.
3. Tap *Pair*.

_Code expires in 5 minutes._
google_pair_prompt:
```
{code}
```
👆 Tap the code to copy.

Then open the *{brand_name}* extension on any tab and use the *Connect Gmail & Calendar* section — paste this code and click *Connect Google*.

_Code expires in 5 minutes._
google_not_configured: ⚠️ Google integration isn't configured yet — ask your admin to set GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.
description_edit_prompt: Send me the corrected description as a reply. I'll update it before filing. ✏️
connect_ai_first:
I can help with that once your AI is connected.

👉 /login — takes about 30 seconds
connect_ai_before_receipts:
I can't read receipts until we connect an AI.

{next_steps}
connect_omnihr_before_receipts:
AI is connected but I can't file claims until you link OmniHR.

{next_steps}
web_all_set_body: You're fully connected. Open Telegram → and send a receipt photo or PDF to file your first claim.
web_ai_connected_body:
Two more steps to go:

2. Install the Chrome extension — the page walks you through it (~30 seconds).

3. Sign in to your company's OmniHR (<your-company>.omnihr.co, e.g. glints.omnihr.co) in Chrome, then send /connect_omnihr in Telegram. Paste the 6-digit code into the 💰 extension icon to finish.
web_progress_saved_body: Go back to Telegram and send /login to connect your AI.
auth_start_subtitle: Connect your AI to parse receipts
